research_gaps: Validator count and distribution not confirmed.
Discord and Telegram exact member counts not verified.
Real user numbers unclear — claimed 15-20M but admitted purging ~6M bots.
No active on-chain governance proposals found.
No third-party audit of SPEX system found.
Madrid-based entity registration details not verified.

identity.name: Warden Protocol
identity.tagline: The distribution layer for the agent economy
identity.one_liner: Purpose-built L1 blockchain for AI agents in Web3 with verifiable inference (SPEX), agentic wallet, and agent marketplace. Heavy Qredo/Binance alumni team.

founding_team.name: David Pinger
founding_team.background: LMU Munich + Pantheon Sorbonne (summa cum laude). Ex-Uber, ex-Binance. Led R&D at Qredo Labs.

founding_team.name: Antonio Pitasi
founding_team.background: Software engineer. Ex-Tendermint/Ignite (Emeris project). Cosmos SDK expertise.

founding_team.name: Alex Melikhov
founding_team.background: CEO of Equilibrium (EOSDT stablecoin, $20M collateral). Polkadot parachain experience.

founding_team.name: Jon Heywood
founding_team.background: 15+ years tech. Ex-Qredo. Built SpaceWard. Digital agency founder in Dubai.

rounds.notes: Fjord Foundry IDO at $460M FDV. 1.161M WARP tokens at $0.46.

technical.architecture_summary: Purpose-built EVM blockchain for AI agents. Key components: SPEX (Statistical Proof of Execution) for verifiable AI inference via probabilistic sampling and validator consensus. AVRs (Asynchronous Verifiable Resources) as cross-chain plugins. Agentic Wallet with natural language interface. Agent Hub marketplace. Multi-chain support via IBC, Hyperlane, deBridge.
technical.consensus_mechanism: Proof-of-Stake with dynamic inflation (1-10%) targeting 65% staked.
technical.what_is_onchain: Agent execution, SPEX inference proofs, WARD staking, governance, agent fees, operator bonding.
technical.what_is_offchain: AI model inference, agent computation, natural language processing.
technical.licensing_concern: x/async module is proprietary with restricted use — core infrastructure partially closed source.

token_utility: 3% community tax burn on protocol fees
tokenomics.burn_mechanism: 3% community tax on protocol fees burned programmatically.
tokenomics.emission_model: Unlimited max supply with PoS inflation (1-10%). Total supply 1B at genesis. Inflationary emissions ongoing.

usage_metrics.usage_notes: 10.9M cumulative on-chain txns. 60.4M AI agent runs. 11.7M inference proofs. $749K protocol revenue. $704K agent revenue. Claimed 15-20M users but purged ~6M bots.

methods.description: Stake WARD to secure WardenChain via PoS. Dynamic inflation targeting 65% staked.
Use the Agentic Wallet for natural language crypto operations. Access Agent Hub for pre-built AI agents.
Build AI agents using Warden Studio and deploy on Agent Hub. SPEX for verifiable inference.
Vote on protocol proposals using staked WARD.

freedom_score.freedom_summary: Warden Protocol is a very young project (TGE February 2026) with heavy team control. 42% insider allocation, proprietary core module (x/async), no governance track record, inflated user numbers, and ex-centralised-exchange leadership culture. The SPEX verifiable inference concept is interesting but unproven.

infrastructure_decentralisation.evidence: PoS chain with validator set but details on count and distribution are sparse. WardenChain is very young (mainnet ~mid 2025). x/async module is proprietary — core infrastructure has centralised control. SPEX is novel but unproven at scale.

governance_decentralisation.evidence: Token-based governance exists but is very new (token launched Feb 2026). Treasury holds 22% with 120M unlocked at genesis. Core contributors hold 20% with vesting. No evidence of active on-chain governance proposals. Heavy centralisation around founding team.

token_distribution_fairness.evidence: Only 4.7% to initial airdrop. 42% controlled by team (20% core contributors + 22% treasury). Strategic investors only 2%. Fjord Foundry IDO participants down -97.8%. 25% circulating at TGE.

censorship_resistance.evidence: Claims zk-SNARK integration for privacy but unverified. Permissionless agent deployment is positive. Multi-chain presence reduces single-point failure. Protocol is young and team-controlled — could realistically censor agents.

data_sovereignty.evidence: User key management through cryptographic IDs. SPEX provides verifiable AI inference. Cross-chain operation avoids ecosystem lock-in. Privacy features claimed but implementation unclear. Agent execution flows through WardenChain.

open_source_transparency.evidence: Main repo Apache 2.0 with 2,185 stars. However, x/async module is proprietary — meaningful gap in open source commitment. 36 repos with active development. Agent-kit MIT licensed. Team is public and identifiable.

token_utility.evidence: Gas token on WardenChain. Agent execution fee payment. PoS staking. Governance voting. Operator bonding reduces circulating supply. Gated functionality. Very early — actual fee revenue modest (~$750K cumulative 2025).

value_accrual.evidence: 3% community tax burn on protocol fees — modest deflationary pressure. Validator bonding locks supply. Agent fees create buy pressure. Revenue is small ($750K/year). Unlimited max supply with 1-10% inflation offsets burn. Trading near ATL.

supply_dynamics.evidence: 25% circulating at TGE with structured vesting. Core contributor 6-month cliff + 24-month linear. Validator tokens permanently locked. Unlimited max supply with PoS inflation (1-10%). 120M treasury tokens unlocked at genesis is concerning.

revenue_sustainability.evidence: Protocol revenue ~$750K in 2025. Agent revenue ~$704K. $1M agent incentive programme. Multiple revenue streams. Revenue tiny relative to claimed user base. Sustainability unproven. Heavily dependent on agent adoption.

liquidity_access.evidence: 13 exchanges including Binance Alpha, KuCoin, Bybit, BingX. Multi-chain (WardenChain, BNB Chain, Base). $2.6-4.6M daily volume. $2.5M market cap — high volatility. Down 93% from ATH in one month. IDO investors down 97.8%.
